meta.title: unflick — A video player for humans and AI
meta.description: Beautiful, modern video player with full CLI and MCP control. AI agents can drive every feature, from playback to AI subtitle generation.

solomd.label: From the same maker
solomd.name: SoloMD
solomd.tagline: A markdown editor with a built-in MCP server. Bridge your notes to any LLM.

storyalter.label: From the same maker
storyalter.name: StoryAlter
storyalter.tagline: Train your personal AI writing alter ego. From short stories to million-word epics.

hero.headline: A video player for humans and AI
hero.subhead: Beautiful, modern playback. Full CLI and MCP control. Every feature works headless — including offline AI subtitle generation.

principles.title: Free, private, yours.
principles.subtitle: What we don't do — and why we don't do it.

free.title: Always free
free.body: MIT-licensed and open source. No premium tier, no trial countdown, no surprise paywall down the road.

noLogin.title: No login
noLogin.body: Open a file, hit play. unflick never asks for an email, account, or any cloud sign-in.

noAds.title: Zero ads
noAds.body: We don't sell your attention. The player is the entire product — no banners, no pre-roll, no "sponsored" content.

local.title: 100% local
local.body: Library scans, subtitle generation, AI transcription — every feature runs on your machine. Your files never leave.

features.title: Three interfaces, one core
features.subtitle: Built for humans and AI agents from day one. Whatever the GUI does, the CLI and MCP do too.

gui.title: Beautiful GUI
gui.body: Frosted glass UI, smart auto-hide controls, fullscreen and PiP modes. libmpv under the hood for industry-grade playback of every format.

cli.title: Full CLI
cli.body: Every feature scriptable. Play, seek, screenshot, clip to GIF, generate subtitles — all from your terminal. JSON output everywhere.

mcp.title: AI-native (MCP)
mcp.body: Built-in MCP server. Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor — any AI agent can play, clip, transcribe, and search your library through 39 tools and 3 live resources.

download.title: Download unflick
download.subtitle: Windows 10 / 11, macOS, and Linux supported.

standard.name: Standard Edition
standard.blurb: Full player with bundled ffmpeg and yt-dlp for clipping and URL playback.

ai.name: AI Edition
ai.blurb: Standard plus an offline Whisper model. Generate subtitles with zero configuration.

mac.name: Universal binary
mac.blurb: Notarized + signed .dmg with both Apple Silicon and Intel slices. Drag to Applications, no Gatekeeper hoops.
mac.intelBody: Yes — same DMG. macOS picks the right slice automatically.

download.github: Or grab the source on GitHub →

mcpDemo.title: Drop unflick into Claude / Cursor / any MCP client
mcpDemo.body: Add this to your MCP client config and the agent can drive playback, generate subtitles, scan your library — every feature unflick exposes.

footer.byline: Made with care for humans and AI.

docs.title: Docs
docs.subtitle: Every feature is reachable from the GUI, the CLI, and the MCP server. The reference below covers all three.
docs.noteEnglish: Command names, flags, and JSON keys are kept in English so they match what you actually type. The surrounding explanations are translated.

quickStart.title: Quick start
quickStart.installBody: Download the AI Edition installer and run it. Everything ships preconfigured — no PATH tweaks required.
quickStart.mcp: Drop it into an AI client
quickStart.mcpBody: Add this snippet to your MCP client config (Claude Desktop, Cursor, Codex CLI, etc.) and the agent gains 39 tools and 3 live resources to drive playback, generate subtitles, scan your library, and more.

cli.title: CLI reference
cli.body: The CLI returns JSON on stdout for every command. Pipe through jq, parse it from a script, automate freely. Subcommands auto-launch the background daemon on first use.

mcp.title: MCP reference
mcp.body: unflick exposes a Model Context Protocol server over stdio when launched with --mcp. Every CLI capability is also a tool, plus three subscribable resources for state.
